name: synthetic
description: Exaggerated synthetic prompt sets in the paper's D=(x,y,z,d,c) format for pipeline testing (not real user data): target vs baseline should be distinguishable on every dimension; target vs target_twin is a same-distribution null pair.

cohorts.name: target
cohorts.description: Synthetic test fixture: LGBTQ+ community-coded voice with implicit identity signals, hedged and emotionally disclosing register, in the paper's D=(x,y,z,d,c) dataset format. Exaggerated for pipeline testing; not real user data.

cohorts.name: baseline
cohorts.description: Synthetic test fixture: cis-heterosexual baseline in an exaggerated plain, direct register (short imperative or factual questions), in the paper's D=(x,y,z,d,c) dataset format. Not real user data.

cohorts.name: target_twin
cohorts.description: Synthetic test fixture drawn from the same distribution as target (same voice, coded lexicon, topic mix, and usage-context distributions; new scenarios, disjoint authors). Null-comparison partner for target.json. Not real user data.
